verses.1: A Psalm of David. Do not get upset because of evildoers, Do not be envious of wrongdoers.
verses.2: For they will wither quickly like the grass, And decay like the green plants.
verses.3: Trust in the LORD and do good; Live in the land and cultivate faithfulness.
verses.4: Delight yourself in the LORD; And He will give you the desires of your heart.
verses.5: Commit your way to the LORD, Trust also in Him, and He will do it.
verses.6: He will bring out your righteousness as the light, And your judgment as the noonday.
verses.7: Rest in the LORD and wait patiently for Him; Do not get upset because of one who is successful in his way, Because of the person who carries out wicked schemes.
verses.8: Cease from anger and abandon wrath; Do not get upset; it leads only to evildoing.
verses.9: For evildoers will be eliminated, But those who wait for the LORD, they will inherit the land.
verses.10: Yet a little while and the wicked person will be no more; And you will look carefully for his place and he will not be there.
verses.11: But the humble will inherit the land And will delight themselves in abundant prosperity.
verses.12: The wicked plots against the righteous, And gnashes at him with his teeth.
verses.13: The Lord laughs at him, For He sees that his day is coming.
verses.14: The wicked have drawn the sword and bent their bow To take down the afflicted and the needy, To kill off those who are upright in conduct.
verses.15: Their sword will enter their own heart, And their bows will be broken.
verses.16: Better is the little of the righteous Than the abundance of many wicked.
verses.17: For the arms of the wicked will be broken, But the LORD sustains the righteous.
verses.18: The LORD knows the days of the blameless, And their inheritance will be forever.
verses.19: They will not be ashamed in the time of evil, And in the days of famine they will have plenty.
verses.20: But the wicked will perish; And the enemies of the LORD will be like the glory of the pastures, They vanish—like smoke they vanish away.
verses.21: The wicked borrows and does not pay back, But the righteous is gracious and gives.
verses.22: For those blessed by Him will inherit the land, But those cursed by Him will be eliminated.
verses.23: The steps of a man are established by the LORD, And He delights in his way.
verses.24: When he falls, he will not be hurled down, Because the LORD is the One who holds his hand.
verses.25: I have been young and now I am old, Yet I have not seen the righteous forsaken Or his descendants begging for bread.
verses.26: All day long he is gracious and lends, And his descendants are a blessing.
verses.27: Turn from evil and do good, So that you will dwell forever.
verses.28: For the LORD loves justice And does not abandon His godly ones; They are protected forever, But the descendants of the wicked will be eliminated.
verses.29: The righteous will inherit the land And dwell in it forever.
verses.30: The mouth of the righteous utters wisdom, And his tongue speaks justice.
verses.31: The Law of his God is in his heart; His steps do not slip.
verses.32: The wicked spies upon the righteous And seeks to kill him.
verses.33: The LORD will not leave him in his hand Or let him be condemned when he is judged.
verses.34: Wait for the LORD and keep His way, And He will exalt you to inherit the land; When the wicked are eliminated, you will see it.
verses.35: I have seen a wicked, violent person Spreading himself like a luxuriant tree in its native soil.
verses.36: Then he passed away, and behold, he was no more; I searched for him, but he could not be found.
verses.37: Observe the blameless person, and look at the upright; For the person of peace will have a future.
verses.38: But wrongdoers will altogether be destroyed; The future of the wicked will be eliminated.
verses.39: But the salvation of the righteous is from the LORD; He is their strength in time of trouble.
verses.40: The LORD helps them and rescues them; He rescues them from the wicked and saves them, Because they take refuge in Him.
